MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Parkmerced Investors Properties is present. Represented by Julie Anderson.
Attorney David Wasserman appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jason M. Moananu is present.
Attorney Kevin Frankel representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A , for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of July-30-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
